violations.text: (Heavy duty floor cleaner) was stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Chemical moved to proper areas at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen and the front prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen and the front prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The water at the hand sink in the bathroom was observed to be 63 degrees Fahrenheit. Hand sinks must be 100 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The ceiling in the kitchen and the front prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
